---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the notebook produces wrong or unexpected output
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What's wrong

Describe what output is incorrect (scores, universe grouping, Competitive Landscape, notes
carry-forward, formatting, etc.) and what you expected instead.

## Example

A concrete example helps a lot — e.g. "Broker X should score Y but got Z" or "Property Type
'ABC' should land in universe X but lands in Y".

## Steps to reproduce

1. Which CoStar export(s) / ledger / prior scorecard were used
2. Which cell(s) you ran
3. What happened

## Screenshots / output (optional)

Paste relevant console output, a screenshot of the workbook tab, or a snippet of the offending
data (redact broker PII where possible).
